rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no textual or operational relationship to Educ. Code §37.1083, which governs agency monitoring of school district safety and security requirements. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 37.1083. AGENCY MONITORING OF SCHOOL DISTRICT SAFETY AND SECURITY REQUIREMENTS.
_note: Rule text concerns school safety monitoring; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
